channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Report: Strait of Hormuz Disruption Expected Through May
item.description: A U.S. Department of Energy report indicates the Strait of Hormuz will likely be effectively closed through late May, according to a report.

item.title: NYC Allocates Funds to Public Schools Amid Enrollment and Test Score Declines
Importers Receive Trump Tariff Refunds
item.description: Oshkosh Corp and Basic Fun reported receiving partial refunds related to import tariffs on Tuesday.

item.title: Greenland PM Discusses US Military Presence
item.description: Negotiations with Washington include discussions about a potential increase in the U.S. military presence in Greenland, its prime minister stated.
